title: Return From Business
content:
Evenings in trains,
    When the little black twittering ghosts
    Along the brims of cuttings,
    Against the luminous sky,
    Interrupt with their hurrying rumour every thought
    Save that one is young and setting,
    Headlong westering,
    And there is no recapture.
meaning:
Aldous Leonard Huxley's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Return From Business"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
